---
name: review-pr
description: Review pull requests for correctness, security, and maintainability. Use when users want a code review, need to check PR changes, or want feedback on their implementation.
---

# Review PR

A skill for reviewing pull requests with a focus on code quality.

## When to Use

- User asks for a code review
- User wants feedback on a pull request
- User needs to check changes for security or correctness issues
